api: Keep /api/v1 versioning stable for the React SPA.
Use pagination for list endpoints and cap limit at 100.
Prefer explicit filters over ad hoc query parameters.
Use operationId values as stable client generation names.
bookingConcurrency: Create bookings through a single application service that performs locker status validation, overlap validation, and write in one atomic flow.
Use idempotency keys for booking creation if the frontend may retry POST requests.
Use server-side UTC clock for all booking validity decisions.
lockerVisualization: Build visualization from lockers plus active bookings for a location at request time.
Cache very short-lived visualization responses only if invalidated after booking create/cancel/status changes.
Never persist AVAILABLE, OCCUPIED, or MY_BOOKING visualization status.
observability: Add request id/correlation id to logs.
Track booking conflict rate, OAuth callback failures, refresh rotation failures, and locker command latency.
Keep access logs append-only for auditability.
